mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tiktok_ad_tasks WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM tiktok_ad_tasks WHERE status = 'pending' AND (scheduled_at IS NULL OR scheduled_at <= NOW()) ORDER BY priority DESC, scheduled_at ASC, created_at ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE tiktok_ad_tasks SET status = #{status}, result_id = #{resultId}, result_data = #{resultData}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, retry_count = #{retryCount}, started_at = #{startedAt}, completed_at = #{completedAt}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tiktok_ad_tasks SET status = #{status}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tiktok_ad_tasks WHERE advertiser_id = #{advertiserId} AND status = #{status}
